overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through a vibrant rural countryside. The scene showcases lush meadows with colorful wildflowers, wooden fences, vineyard rows, and distant mountains under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through wildflower meadows

events.description: wooden fence enters view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass and wildflowers with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the meadow with visible wheel ruts
tall grass with red poppies and purple lupines
tall grass with red poppies and purple lupines
large leafy deciduous tree beside the path
blue mountain range visible on the horizon under white clouds
rustic wooden post fence running parallel to the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a winding dirt trail through a vibrant summer meadow filled with wildflowers. A large oak tree stands to the left while distant mountains frame the horizon. Around the 10-second mark, a rustic wooden fence enters the frame from the left, running alongside the path as the camera continues forward through the tall grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: vineyard and farmland along the trail

events.description: Geralt turns his head and upper body to observe the vineyard on the right
wooden fence and vineyard exit view as the path curves into open fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking while glancing at the vineyard and distant farmhouse on the right, then proceeds along the curving path

entered.detail: weathered stone pillars marking the boundary of vineyard rows
rows of cultivated grapevines growing on the right side of the path
distant building with an orange roof visible beyond the vineyard

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks past the wooden fence with a vineyard appearing on the right, marked by stone posts and rows of grapevines. He briefly turns to observe a distant farmhouse with an orange roof. As the path curves around the 35-second mark, the fence and vineyard fall behind, transitioning to open meadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside trail approaching wooded area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path through open fields with scattered trees lining the route

entered.detail: cluster of deciduous trees lining the left side of the winding path

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt continuing along the winding dirt trail through open countryside. The vineyard and farmhouse have passed out of view, replaced by scattered trees lining the left side of the path. The trail meanders through grassy fields with distant mountains still visible on the horizon under the bright midday sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from a wildflower meadow into a cultivated vineyard area before opening back up into the rural countryside. It begins with Geralt walking past a large oak tree and through vibrant summer grass, as a rustic wooden fence gradually enters the frame from the left. As the path progresses, the scene shifts to include rows of grapevines and stone posts on the right, while the camera briefly pivots toward a distant farmhouse with an orange roof. The view then expands as the fence and vineyard fall behind, transitioning the landscape back into open meadows. Finally, the trail meanders through grassy fields lined with scattered trees, keeping the distant mountains visible under a bright midday sky.
